zh.name: 浏览器工具箱
zh.description: 纯前端浏览器工具箱，一些常用的浏览器工具合集。
zh.longDescription: 把日常开发与排查里常用的小工具收进同一个纯前端页面：打开即用，无需安装。适合随手测量、转换和调试。

en.name: Browser Toolbox
en.description: A pure frontend browser toolbox with commonly used utilities.
en.longDescription: A single-page collection of everyday browser utilities — open and use instantly, no install required. Handy for quick measuring, converting, and debugging.

zh.name: P4G面具合成查询器
zh.description: P4G面具合成查询器，可以查询面具的合成配方。
zh.longDescription: 面向《女神异闻录4 黄金版》的面具合成查询工具：按目标面具或素材反向查找配方，少翻攻略表。

en.name: P4G Persona Fusion Finder
en.description: Look up Persona fusion recipes in Persona 4 Golden.
en.longDescription: A Persona 4 Golden fusion helper: search by target Persona or materials and find recipes without digging through guide spreadsheets.

zh.name: Ins拼图生成器
zh.description: Ins拼图生成器，可以生成Ins风格的拼图。
zh.longDescription: 在浏览器里拼出 Instagram 风格拼图：排版、导出一气呵成，适合分享前快速出图。

en.name: Instagram Collage Maker
en.longDescription: Build Instagram-style collages in the browser — layout and export in one place, ready to share.

zh.name: 无水印视频下载
zh.description: 视频链接解析，一键获取无水印视频下载。
zh.longDescription: 粘贴视频链接即可解析可下载地址，尽量拿到无水印资源。适合备份与二次剪辑前的素材收集。

en.name: Video Downloader
en.description: Parse a video link and download without watermark when possible.
en.longDescription: Paste a video URL to resolve a downloadable source, preferring watermark-free media when available — handy for archiving or editing.
